title: HairStylist Hiring
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a motivated and customer-focused Hair Stylist to join our professional salon team. The successful candidate will be responsible for delivering quality hair services, conducting personalised consultations, and ensuring a positive and consistent customer experience. Both experienced stylists and newly qualified candidates from the hairdressing industry are welcome to apply.

Responsibilities

  • Perform a full range of hair services including cutting, colouring, perming, rebonding, treatments, and styling to meet customer preferences
  • Conduct professional hair and scalp consultations to identify customer needs and recommend suitable hairstyles, colours, and hair care treatments
  • Maintain cleanliness, hygiene, and organisation of tools and workstations to ensure a safe and efficient salon environment
  • Deliver consistent service standards by providing positive customer experiences that encourage repeat visits
  • Promote and upsell salon services and retail products by identifying customer needs during consultations
  • Stay updated with the latest hair trends, techniques, and industry practices to enhance service quality
  • Collaborate effectively with team members to support smooth salon operations and a positive work atmosphere

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Relevant experience as a Hair Stylist is preferred; newly qualified or entry-level candidates from the hairdressing industry are welcome to apply
  • Relevant hairdressing certification or professional training preferred
  • Proficient in cutting, colouring, and chemical hair services
  • Strong interpersonal and customer service skills
  • Ability to work weekends, public holidays, and rotating shifts
  • Responsible, self-motivated, and professional work attitude

Work Location Multiple locations (Singapore)

Other Information

  • Successful candidates may be deployed to any of the company’s salon outlets across Singapore based on operational requirements
  • Deployment will be communicated in advance and aligned with business needs
  • Employment Type: Full-time / Part-time
  • Working Hours: Shift-based, including weekends and public holidays

Salary & Benefit

  • Monthly Basic Salary
  • Commission and performance-based incentives provided
  • Highly driven and high-performing candidates can achieve a total monthly remuneration of SGD 5,000 – 7,000, inclusive of commission and incentives
  • CPF contributions in accordance with Singapore regulations
  • Staff discounts on salon services and retail products
  • Training, skills upgrading, and clear career progression opportunities
